patterns_recognized: CRITICAL PICK-DIRECTION ERRORS CORRECTED: prior run (existing 2026-06-03.json) misidentified model picks for COL@LAA (wrote LAA, CSV pick=COL) and OAK@CHC (wrote CHC, CSV pick=OAK). Both are Stage 1/2 disagree away-team picks — exact pattern flagged in June 1, May 29, and May 30 postgames. SF@MIL was also wrongly labeled PENDING_SP_DATA; CSV shows GOLD B+ pick for MIL with grade_score=3 and positive edge +7.77pp.

D-grade dual-opposing-signal (SP xERA AND PQI both against the pick) fires on CHW@MIN, CLE@NYY, KC@CIN, PIT@HOU, and COL@LAA — archive pattern consistent across May 28-30: ~25-30% directional win rate on these picks. All are correct SKIP regardless of model tier label.

Bullpen fatigue stress-flag invalidates Stage-2 carry thesis: TEX@STL has stress_warnings=bullpen_fatigue with hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=0.0 (zero pen advantage) — no structural mechanism for the Stage-2 carry to materialize. DOWNGRADE applied.

HARD CAP 9 and HARD CAP 6 both correctly fired in the pipeline for TOR@ATL (pick_prob=0.886, edge=+29.51pp) — no manual override needed; prior run's 'pipeline miss' claim was itself an error based on stale CSV data.

SF@MIL GOLD B+ is the slate's only actionable pick: F3+PQI+positive edge (+7.77pp)+Stage agree, with the critical caveat that home_sp=Logan Webb may reflect a post-Aug-2025 trade or a SP assignment artifact; the F3/PQI signals are independent of SP attribution.

MIA @ WSH.reasoning: WSH home at 65.9% Stage 2 with F2+F3 signals (xwOBA gap + swing/take=6234) and bullpen edge (gap=-0.011). No fair_prob market anchor — Odds API did not fire, matching May 30 'fair_prob missing = directional uncertainty' pattern. PQI AGAINST (-8.3) flags late-game degradation. Extreme f5_full_delta=0.301 means WSH carry thesis requires pen bridge from large F5 deficit. Grade correctly capped at C; direction may be right but no actionable edge without market validation.
lessons_applied: fair_prob_missing+60-67pct_model_prob = directional uncertainty (5/30 MIA@NYM pattern)
PQI-against-pick with large-f5_full_delta = Stage2 carry risk
Stage1/2 disagree (Δ=0.301) without pen gap support

DET @ TB.reasoning: f5_full_delta=0.360 is the largest Stage 1/2 gap on the slate — DET wins F5 at ~71% implied, requiring TB bullpen to bridge a multi-run deficit. This exact pattern failed June 1 (DET@TB, DET led 7-0 through 5 innings and ultimately won 10-9 in a 0.326-delta game). No signals fire for TB; no fair_prob anchor. Troy Melton (TB home) faces Nick Martinez (DET away); D-grade is correct — TB's carry thesis has no structural support.
lessons_applied: Stage1-carry-thesis consecutive failure: DET@TB June 1 (delta=0.326 loss for carry-thesis)
no-signals + extreme-f5_full_delta = zero conviction for Stage 2

CHW @ MIN.reasoning: Dual D-grade signals oppose CHW: Erick Fedde (MIN home) holds 0.83 xERA edge over Taj Bradley (CHW away), and PQI AGAINST CHW (Δ=+9.4). Per archive, D-grade with SP xERA AND PQI both opposing shows ~25-30% directional win rate — structural avoid. Stage 1/2 disagree (Δ=0.232, CHW dominates F5 but Stage 2 erodes) adds carry-thesis risk. No fair_prob market anchor. SKIP confirmed.
lessons_applied: D-grade-dual-opposing-signal = ~25-30pct directional win rate (5/28, 5/29 archive)
Stage1/2 disagree without pen gap = carry-thesis unreliable

NYM @ SEA.reasoning: SEA pre-cap B+ (score=3): F3_swing_take_gap=2446.2, PQI confirms SEA (+4.0), Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.018). HARD CAP 1 fires at -6.59pp (score 3→1 B-). CONFIRM to bypass HARD CAP 10 and preserve B-: Freddy Peralta (SEA home) faces George Kirby (NYM away), hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.009 (SEA pen better). June 1 context: SEA won 3-2 in 10 innings in a similar setup. Modest negative edge (-6.6pp) with genuine pre-cap signals warrants low-conviction CONFIRM; stake is B- only.
lessons_applied: pre-cap-B-plus-rescue at modest negative edge with multi-signal confirmation
HARD-CAP-1 fires (B-); CONFIRM bypasses HARD-CAP-10 to preserve B- stake
SEA won 6/1 NYM@SEA directionally; pattern repeats with same matchup

SD @ PHI.reasoning: Market prices PHI at 70.0% (fair_prob=0.700) while model says 51.8% — market leads by 18.2pp. HARD CAP 1 fires correctly. F1_xera_gap=2.71 (Walker Buehler over Cristopher Sánchez) and PQI +30.4 both confirm PHI directionally — model direction is right, but model confidence is 18pp below market price. Staking below our own edge at this margin is structurally negative-EV. Grade C SKIP is correct; no rescue at -18.2pp regardless of signal quality.
lessons_applied: massive-negative-edge-market-authority (-18.2pp): market priced PHI far ahead of model
HARD-CAP-1 correct; direction right but no stake mechanic

BAL @ BOS.reasoning: BOS home: SP edge 2.45 xERA (Chris Bassitt over Payton Tolle) and PQI +36.2 (strongest PQI confirm on slate today) both support BOS. Market agrees: fair_prob=0.604 vs model's 50.1% — market prices BOS far more aggressively. But Stage 2 barely clears 0.50 (0.5005), and hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0011 means no bullpen carry support. Tier was SKIP; negative edge (-10.29pp) prevents any stake regardless. CONFIRM direction — BOS is likely right per market and SP/PQI signals.
lessons_applied: Stage2-carry-needs-negative-pen-gap, not near-zero or positive
negative-edge-market-authority: market at 60.4% agrees BOS, no stake mechanic

CLE @ NYY.reasoning: Despite a strong F3 signal (6,869.7 — second-highest on slate) and F2 confirmation, NYY faces Gerrit Cole (CLE away) with 0.79 xERA edge for CLE, plus PQI AGAINST NYY (Δ=-13.7). Dual-opposing-signal D-grade runs ~25-30% directional win rate per archive. pick_prob=0.502 is effectively a coin flip. HARD CAP 1 fires (-8.92pp). Cole's established SP quality is the controlling signal over F3 alone. SKIP confirmed.
lessons_applied: D-grade-dual-opposing-signal: SP xERA + PQI both against NYY = ~25-30pct win rate
F3 alone cannot override dual opposing signals at coin-flip probability

KC @ CIN.reasoning: Triple-opposing-signal D-grade (-3): Chase Burns (KC away) holds 0.42 xERA edge over Stephen Kolek (CIN home), PQI AGAINST KC (Δ=+8.2), and Stage 1/2 disagree (Δ=0.293, CIN wins F5 at ~73.5%). fair_prob=0.409 < 0.42 minimum blocks market validation. F3 fires for KC (4083.2) but is insufficient against triple opposing signals. Burns is a quality young home SP; this is the most reliable SKIP on the slate structurally.
lessons_applied: D-grade triple-opposing-signal: most reliable SKIP indicator in archive
fair_prob_below_0.42 = market-level SKIP confirmation

TOR @ ATL.reasoning: ATL's 88.57% model probability triggers HARD CAP 9 (archive: 33.3% actual vs 87.3% predicted at >0.80 bucket) AND HARD CAP 6 (+29.51pp calibrator hallucination). Both caps correctly fired in the pipeline. F1*_xera_gap=1.22 has thin-sample asterisk (Holmes). Fair_prob=0.591 appears to be a pipeline fallback, not a real market price. ATL may well win (direction plausible with Patrick Corbin facing their lineup), but 88.57% confidence is structurally impossible in MLB single-game markets.
lessons_applied: HARD-CAP-9 top-bucket catastrophic miscalibration (33.3% actual vs 87.3% predicted)
HARD-CAP-6 edge>25pp calibrator hallucination
F1-asterisk thin-sample (Holmes) adds secondary caution

SF @ MIL.reasoning: MIL home GOLD B+ with genuine conviction: F3_swing_take_gap=2698.3, PQI confirms (+10.5), Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.082), positive edge +7.77pp. Balanced MIL lineup (concentration 0.965) vs SF's mildly top-heavy order (1.252). hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0014 (neutral). Note: home_sp listed as Logan Webb — per 5/29 postgame, Webb was pitching for SF at Coors; if a post-Aug-2025 trade, MIL gains elite SP quality. F3+PQI signals are independent of SP attribution and confirm MIL regardless. Prior run wrongly labeled this PENDING_SP_DATA — the CSV shows GOLD B+ with pick=MIL.
lessons_applied: corrected-prior-run-error: SF@MIL is GOLD B+ not PENDING_SP_DATA
F3+PQI+Stage-agree+positive-edge = reliable CONFIRM archetype (5/28 CHW@MIN WIN)
balanced lineup vs top-heavy opponent favors MIL stringing hits

TEX @ STL.reasoning: DOWNGRADE: stress_warnings=bullpen_fatigue directly invalidates the Stage-2 carry mechanism. STL wins F5 only 41.9% (Gore pitching, f5_prob=0.419) and needs the pen to carry from behind — yet the pen is flagged as fatigued. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=0.0 (zero pen advantage). confidence_downgrade=True. HARD CAP 1 fires (edge=-0.09pp). MacKenzie Gore (TEX away) holds higher K% advantage. Combined: no structural basis for a STL Stage-2 carry when the pen is compromised. DOWNGRADE from GOLD to SKIP.
lessons_applied: bullpen_fatigue_stress_flag invalidates Stage2_carry_thesis (5/26 pattern)
hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=0 + fatigued pen = carry thesis has no insurance
confidence_downgrade_True + edge below minimum = DOWNGRADE trigger

OAK @ CHC.reasoning: DOWNGRADE from DIAMOND to GOLD. OAK's pre-cap A-grade (score=8) is the slate's strongest signal stack: F1_xera_gap=1.67, F3_swing_take_gap=1550.7, F5_bullpen_gap=+0.43, PQI confirms (-13.4), positive edge +6.87pp. However, pick_prob=0.513 means the calibrated full-game probability barely clears 50% despite elite signals — acute_roster flag introduces unknown lineup composition risk. HARD CAP 10 archive: CONFIRM in (0.50, 0.55] band hits 47.6% (below break-even). DIAMOND overstates conviction for a 51.3% pick; GOLD is appropriate.
lessons_applied: HARD-CAP-10 bottom-bucket CONFIRM archive = 47.6% (below break-even)
acute_roster_flag + confidence_downgrade = unknown lineup risk
pre_cap_A with coin-flip full_prob = structural tension that DIAMOND overstates

lessons_applied: PQI-against-magnitude largest on slate (Δ=-40.1) = strongest late-game degradation signal
fair_prob_below_0.42 threshold confirms market-level SKIP
D-grade-dual-opposing-signal: SP xERA + PQI both against HOU

LAD @ ARI.reasoning: LAD holds strong F1_xera_gap=4.33 (no thin-sample asterisk — full Statcast data) and the slate's strongest PQI confirmation (-46.1). Market agrees: fair_prob=0.664 has LAD at 66.4% vs model's 52.8%. HARD CAP 1 fires (-13.55pp, correctly preventing stake below market price). Stage 1/2 disagree extreme (Δ=0.319) — carry thesis risk noted, but hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0064 is near zero (no HARD CAP 7 concern at score=1). Unlike June 1 (F1* thin-sample DOWNGRADE), today's SP edge is substantive. Direction correct; no stake mechanic.
lessons_applied: F1-no-asterisk + strongest-PQI-confirm = legitimate directional conviction
negative-edge-HARD-CAP-1: market already priced LAD advantage; no stake below market
HARD-CAP-7 not triggered (score=1, below threshold of ≥3)
